metadata_mapping.scene_title: window.xv.conf.dyn.video_title OR html5player.setVideoTitle(...) OR JSON-LD VideoObject.name
metadata_mapping.performers: window.xv.conf.dyn.video_models (may be empty); uploader link at /profiles/<name>
metadata_mapping.studio: html5player.setSponsors(...) — usually false for amateur content

search_strategy.notes: GET https://www.xvideos.com/?k=<query> returns paginated HTML listing.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare detected on public pages.
Standard browser-grade headers (User-Agent, Accept-Language) are sufficient.
Add conservative request delays between pagination calls.
known_limitations: video_models array is frequently empty on amateur/upload pages.
Performer pages use /profiles/ not a dedicated pornstar path for user-uploaded content.
Signed CDN media URLs expire; do not store raw stream URLs.
Content URLs include signed tokens and should not be followed for download.
